title: SWEDEN enforcement action against Sportadmin i Skandinavien AB (565,000)
summary: Insufficient technical and organisational measures to ensure information security The Swedish DPA has imposed a fine of EUR 565,500 on Sportadmin i Skandinavien AB. The controller suffered a sucessfull cyber attack, resulting in personal and special category data of 2,126,075 individuals, including minors, beeing published in the darknet....
dedupKey: sweden enforcement action against sportadmin i skandinavien ab 565 000|2026-01-26
